summary: Comprehensive testing of Risk Engine v3 with fresh seed data. Backend: 21/24 tests passed. Frontend: All core flows verified. Coach Williams inbox shows 3 items (Marcus Johnson critical/worsening, Ava Thompson, Olivia Anderson). Coach Garcia inbox shows 3 items (Noah Davis, Sarah Martinez, Isabella Wilson). Director inbox shows 9 items total with 6 high priority. Liam Moore correctly appears with 'No coach assigned'. Lucas Rodriguez appears in director inbox due to advocacy follow-up recommendation (interventionType=monitor so filtered from coach inbox). Support pod pages load correctly for all athlete types.

minor.issue: Lucas Rodriguez (athlete_5) appears in director inbox due to 'follow_up_needed' recommendation in seed data. The test requirement stated he should NOT appear, but seed data intentionally created this state. This is expected behavior based on the data - NOT a code bug.
Endpoint returns 404 - the correct endpoint is /api/athletes/{athlete_id} for basic athlete data. Frontend routes use /support-pods/{id} which works.

action_items: CLARIFICATION NEEDED: Test requirement says Lucas Rodriguez should NOT appear in any inbox, but seed data (rec_3) creates 'follow_up_needed' recommendation for him. Either update seed data to remove this recommendation, or update test requirement.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: Risk Engine v3 fields (severity, trajectory, interventionType, whyNow, riskSignals) correctly populated on all inbox items
PASS: Coach inbox filters by interventionType - 'monitor' items like Lucas Rodriguez are correctly excluded
PASS: Director inbox shows all 9 athletes with issues (excluding Emma Chen who is healthy with no issues)
PASS: Liam Moore correctly shows 'No coach assigned' signal in director inbox
PASS: Marcus Johnson shows CRITICAL severity with Worsening trajectory (25 days inactive)
PASS: Noah Davis shows Improving trajectory (recent autopilot actions)
PASS: Support pod pages load with correct health indicators and school lists
INFO: Lucas Rodriguez appears in director inbox with interventionType='monitor' due to advocacy recommendation. This is filtered out of coach inbox correctly.

success_rate.backend: 87.5% (21/24 tests passed - 3 failures related to test expectations vs seed data)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all dashboard flows verified, support pods load correctly)

seed_data_creation: Used existing seed from seed_fresh.py - 10 athletes with comprehensive risk scenarios
context_for_next_testing_agent: Risk Engine v3 seed data test complete. Key findings: (1) Coach Williams: 3 items in inbox (Marcus critical, Ava, Olivia). (2) Coach Garcia: 3 items (Noah, Sarah, Isabella) - Lucas correctly excluded. (3) Director: 9 items total, 6 high priority. (4) Liam Moore shows no-coach-assigned. (5) Lucas Rodriguez appears in director inbox with 'monitor' interventionType due to rec_3 follow-up recommendation - this causes test_lucas_rodriguez_not_in_director_inbox to fail. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_risk_engine_seed_data.py
